description: Psychiatric diagnostic evaluation with medical services
rationale: The clinical note documents a comprehensive initial psychiatric evaluation for an admitted patient. It includes a detailed history of present illness, past psychiatric and medical history, a full mental status examination, formulation of diagnoses on multiple axes (including medical rule-outs), and a medical plan that involves prescribing medication (quetiapine) and coordinating with internal medicine. Information was also gathered from a collateral source (the patient's partner).
